headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 14, 2026**
article:
The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Ryan O'Hearn leading the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit performance, including a home run and 2 RBIs. The Washington Nationals were also defeated, 15-1 by the Cincinnati Reds, with JJ Bleday leading the Nationals with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 6 RBIs. On the other hand, the New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, affecting their teams' lineups. Cal Raleigh, the Seattle Mariners' catcher, has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain. Other players who have been placed on the injured list include Jimmy Herget of the Colorado Rockies, Brooks Kriske of the Athletics, Robby Snelling of the Miami Marlins, Francisco Alvarez of the New York Mets, Rhett Lowder of the Cincinnati Reds, Drew Pomeranz of the Los Angeles Angels, and Dylan Beavers of the Baltimore Orioles.

The Seattle Mariners traded LHP José Suarez to the Athletics for cash, while the Los Angeles Dodgers traded OF Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks for CF Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Enyel Garcia and RHP Maicol Lauriano to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Pittsburgh Pirates. Ryan O'Hearn led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit performance, including a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Historic Loss to Reds**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals were defeated 15-1 by the Cincinnati Reds in a one-sided game. JJ Bleday led the Nationals with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 6 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mets Take Down Tigers 9-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts. Gage Workman led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Rout Marlins 9-1**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins dominated the Miami Marlins, winning 9-1 behind a strong outing from Zebby Matthews. Matthews pitched 7.0 innings, striking out 5 and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Raleigh Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain.

top_news.title: **Mariners Make Roster Move Ahead of Series**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners traded LHP José Suarez to the Athletics for cash on May 14, 2026. Suarez will join his new team after being part of the Athletics' roster.
